heroDescription: Dark fantasy Minecraft launcher shell for a single server realm.
heroFootnote: The launcher focuses on one world: quick launch, clear status, updates and account flows.

spotlight.title: One server, one route
spotlight.copy: Jump directly into the realm without picking between multiple installs or launch profiles.

spotlight.title: Update before launch
spotlight.copy: The launcher can validate manifests, runtime and client files before the game starts.

spotlight.title: Built around player identity
spotlight.copy: Login, register, account and stats screens all share the same visual system and shell.

news.title: v2.5.0 - Realm Awakening
news.copy: New level cap, custom dungeons, skills overhaul, and the exciting new Gauntlet system!

news.title: v2.5.0 - Realm Awakening
news.copy: View full changelog for balance passes, new areas, rewards and combat tuning across the server.

news.title: Redstone shell updated for JavaFX
news.copy: Home, Play, Mods, Settings, Login, Register and Account now share the same launcher shell.
